entities.name: INFRASTRUCTURE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The creation of physical systems to improve water use efficiency

entities.name: ECOSYSTEM FUNCTIONS
entities.description: Natural processes that influence water use efficiency

entities.name: METRICS OF ANALYSIS
entities.description: Quantitative measures used to analyze water use efficiency across scales

entities.name: EQUATIONS

entities.name: MODELS
